issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. The effect requires trashing from Life cards (top of deck), not hand. Should use TrashFromLife or similar mechanism for Life card trashing.
Filter is empty. Must specify that 1 card is trashed from top of Life cards.
Effect structure is incorrect. This is a conditional action (conditional on trashing a Life card). Should use a condition like 'IfTrashSucceeded' or restructure as optional payment.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' is redundant and incorrect. The card has only one effect triggered on play, not two separate triggers.
'You may' indicates the trash action is optional. The KO should only execute if the trash succeeds, not as an automatic secondary effect.
